intro: The education and homelab sectors were a primary focus of recent Linux-related threats, alongside activity targeting IoT and maker communities. Between April 12 and April 22, 2026, six reports tracked a mix of three high-severity events, one medium, and two informational alerts. The threat actors Harvester, Payouts King, and The Gentlemen were observed in this activity, which showed a global footprint with notable concentration in South Asia.
